description_long: This humanoid robot features a rounded, white head with two vertical, dark blue oval eye-like markings, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its torso is a smooth, rectangular white body with rounded edges, connected to two articulated arms that are attached at black spherical shoulder joints. The arms are cylindrical and end in simple, three-pronged hands, suggesting basic grasping functionality. The lower body consists of a black, segmented cylindrical structure that tapers into a large black sphere, possibly serving as a base or mobility mechanism. The robot's design is minimalist, with a clean color palette of white and black accented by the blue eyes, and lacks any visible clothing or decorative elements. The overall form is compact and non-threatening, suitable for urban environments where interaction with humans is expected.
description: A compact, white and black humanoid robot with a round head, blue oval eyes, articulated arms, and a segmented black base. Its minimalist design and simple features make it approachable and functional for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's round head with blue oval eyes, both arms extended outward, and the full frontal torso and base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the cylindrical arm, and the segmented black base, with one eye partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and torso, both arms extended outward, and the back of the segmented base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, arm, and base, with one blue eye visible.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a neutral standing pose with both arms extended outward at shoulder height, head facing forward, and the base aligned vertically beneath the torso.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated panels and smooth exterior surfaces with no decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a smooth, round surface with two vertical, dark blue oval eye markings and no visible mouth, nose, or expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Each arm is attached via a spherical shoulder joint, allowing for multi-directional movement, and ends in a simple three-pronged hand; no visible elbow or wrist joints, and the base appears to be a single articulated segment.
